# Topic Summary: workspace memory retrieval

## Key Decisions
- Preserve derived summaries as the preferred read path when they already explain the decision trail.
- Use lineage overlap to keep relevant summaries visible even when the query only names an incident from a source session.

## Source Trail
- session:2026-03-21:rollback-ranking-experiment
- session:2026-03-24:follow-up-notes

# Session: rollback-ranking-experiment

## Goal
Understand why an experimental ranker promoted raw sessions ahead of derived summaries.

## Key Decisions
- Keep the baseline retrieval path conservative until lineage-based promotion is stable.
